title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at CarTrade Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at CarTrade Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the CarTrade Capital India family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Srinagar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CarTrade Capital India:
CarTrade Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CarTrade Capital India!
